name: Pathfinder Bancorp, Inc.
business: Pathfinder Bancorp, Inc. is a bank holding company whose primary business is its investment in Pathfinder Bank, a New York-chartered commercial bank that attracts deposits and originates loans secured by commercial and residential real estate, commercial business, and consumer assets. The company serves individuals, families, small to mid-size businesses, and municipalities through 13 branch offices in Oswego and Onondaga Counties, New York.

exposures.sentence: In addition, potential new competitors may be emerging that are generically defined as financial technology (also referred to as FinTech or fintech) companies.

These economies are widely expected to benefit from transformational public and private investments in semiconductor manufacturing, including but not limited to plans for one of the United States largest chip fabrication facilities near two existing Pathfinder Bank branches in Clay, NY and Cicero, NY.
